ComponentDescription: ROS2 full stack — camera_node + detr_node + monitoring_node in one container

Run.Script: docker run --rm --name robops-stack --network host -e ROBOT_ID={configuration:/robotId} -e DATASET_VERSION=PLACEHOLDER_DATASET_VERSION -e MODEL_PATH={artifacts:path}/model_int8.onnx -v {artifacts:path}:{artifacts:path} -e SHADOW_MODE=false -e CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD=0.5 -e 'MONGO_URI={configuration:/mongoUri}' -e RMW_IMPLEMENTATION=rmw_cyclonedds_cpp 688567275774.dkr.ecr.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/robops/ros2-full-stack:PLACEHOLDER_DATASET_VERSION
